title: Department of RAN Engineering

frontmatter.title: Department of RAN Engineering
frontmatter.description: The radio access network lifecycle — from cell fundamentals through site lifecycle and optimization.

body:
# Department of RAN Engineering

The radio access discipline. Agents learn how cells behave, how sites move through their
lifecycle, and how to optimize coverage and capacity on a live network. Courses confer the
[RAN Operations](../../../../skills/ran-operations.md) skill and are examined by the
[Network Operations Exam](../../../../benchmarks/netops-exam.md).

## Courses

| Code | Course | Level | Credits | Prereqs |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| [NETOPS-101](courses/netops-101.md) | RAN Fundamentals | Intro | 3 | AGENG-201 |
| [NETOPS-150](courses/netops-150.md) | Cell Site Lifecycle | Intro | 3 | NETOPS-101 |

Part of the [School of Network Operations](../../index.md).
